name: Jules 21.5" Marble Table Lamp - TBL3030 - White/Black - Safavieh
description: Illuminate your space with the Jules Table Lamp, featuring a striking design that effortlessly combines modern elegance with classic charm. The lamp's white and black color scheme makes it a versatile choice for any interior decor, providing a sophisticated touch to your living room, bedroom, or office. Crafted with a solid marble body, this lamp offers a unique and stylish base that draws the eye. The fabric shade adds a soft, ambient glow that enhances the room's atmosphere while providing functional lighting for reading or relaxing. Whether you're highlighting a specific area of your home or creating a cozy ambiance, the Jules Table Lamp is the perfect addition to elevate your space.
